items.desc_zh: 这名妇女因为其在柬埔寨被监禁的儿子洗钱而被判处一年监禁。

items.title_en: Man charged with attempted murder in attack on home of OpenAI's Sam Altman
items.title_zh: 一名男子被指控在袭击 OpenAI 萨姆·奥尔特曼 (Sam Altman) 家时企图谋杀
items.desc_en: The Texas man, who also faces federal felony charges, allegedly had documents advocating for violence against AI executives.
items.desc_zh: 这名德克萨斯州男子还面临联邦重罪指控，据称他持有鼓吹对人工智能高管实施暴力的文件。

items.title_en: Quantum computing: A tech race Europe could win?
items.title_zh: 量子计算：欧洲可以赢得科技竞赛吗？
items.desc_en: With some promising computing companies in the field, could Europe be a leader in quantum tech?
items.desc_zh: 凭借该领域一些有前景的计算公司，欧洲能否成为量子技术的领导者？

items.title_en: BBC joins paramedics on duty in Lebanon after Israeli strikes
items.title_zh: 以色列袭击后，BBC 加入了黎巴嫩护理人员的行列
items.desc_en: BBC Middle East correspondent Hugo Bachega joins paramedics on duty in Nabatieh - a city that was once vibrant, but is now abandoned.
items.desc_zh: BBC 中东记者雨果·巴切加 (Hugo Bachega) 与护理人员一起在纳巴蒂耶执勤，这座城市曾经充满活力，但现在已被遗弃。

items.title_en: Hungary's next PM would pick up if Putin calls and tell him to stop Ukraine war
items.title_zh: 如果普京打电话告诉匈牙利下一任总理停止乌克兰战争，他将会接电话
items.desc_en: Russia has offered "pragmatic" relations, but Péter Magyar says he will not call Vladimir Putin himself.
items.desc_zh: 俄罗斯提出了“务实”的关系，但彼得·马扎尔表示，他不会亲自致电弗拉基米尔·普京。

items.desc_zh: 此次事件标志着这家游戏巨头第二次遭到年轻的英语黑客的攻击。

items.title_zh: OpenAI 老板萨姆·奥尔特曼 (Sam Altman) 的家遭到燃烧弹攻击
items.desc_en: San Francisco police have arrested a 20-year-old suspect after a perimeter gate was set alight.
items.desc_zh: 旧金山警方在外围大门被纵火后逮捕了一名 20 岁的嫌疑人。

items.title_en: Meta pulls Facebook ads recruiting for social media addiction lawsuits
items.title_zh: Meta 因社交媒体成瘾诉讼而撤回 Facebook 广告招募

items.title_en: Mayor warns of London 'disinformation blizzard'
items.title_zh: 伦敦市长警告“虚假信息暴风雪”
items.desc_en: Sir Sadiq Khan claims London is being targeted with disinformation portraying it as a city "in decline".
items.desc_zh: 萨迪克汗爵士声称伦敦成为虚假信息的目标，将其描绘成一座“衰落”的城市。

items.title_en: Dancer with MND performs on stage again through digital avatar
items.title_zh: 患有 MND 的舞者通过数字化身再次登台表演
items.desc_en: Breanna Olson said brainwave tech was able to re-establish the expression and connection she felt had gone.
items.desc_zh: 布里安娜·奥尔森 (Breanna Olson) 表示，脑电波技术能够重新建立她认为已经消失的表情和联系。

items.desc_en: The gambling platforms have grown in popularity, with some users making wagers on conflicts.
items.desc_zh: 赌博平台越来越受欢迎，一些用户对冲突下注。

items.desc_zh: 此举意味着 2013 年之前发布的 Kindle 用户将无法下载新的电子书。
